understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid was simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, progressing through all levels until the engine reported WIN for the final level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, with x increasing to the right and y increasing downward. If a wall or immovable boundary blocked the destination, the piece did not move; the movement_blocked flags were only hints and did not guarantee failure. If a pushable object (e.g., a block) was directly adjacent in the movement direction and space allowed, it could be pushed along with the selected piece. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces, and control could be switched using CLICK on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable; clicks on empty space or inaccessible/incorrect coordinates had no effect.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' in the semantic grid was simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, progressing through all levels until the engine reported WIN for the final level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, with x increasing to the right and y increasing downward. If a wall or immovable boundary blocked the destination, the piece did not move; the movement_blocked flags were only hints and did not guarantee failure. If a pushable object (e.g., a block) was directly adjacent in the movement direction and space allowed, it could be pushed along with the selected piece. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces, and control could be switched using CLICK on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable; clicks on empty space or inaccessible/incorrect coordinates had no effect.
